prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically focuses on statistics related to the Energy Company Obligation (ECO) and the Green Deal schemes, which are applicable only in England and Wales. Scotland has its own energy efficiency programs and policies, and therefore, this release does not apply to Scotland.
